positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a group of whimsical, interconnected forest creatures—a fox, a rabbit, an owl, and a small deer—interacting in a harmonious circle. The style should be sophisticated modern vector art with a gentle, flowing watercolor wash overlay, giving it a magical, dreamlike quality. Use a limited, nature-inspired palette of deep sage greens, earthy terracotta, muted indigo, and cream. The composition must feature clean silhouettes against a clean background, designed to be visually strong and highly printable on fabric. High contrast is required to ensure the details pop when printed. Flat design elements with subtle texture and depth. Perfect for apparel print.
negative: blur, realistic, photorealism, bokeh, noise, watermark, signature, text, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, dirty, artifacts
